'''Repea''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] near the [[Cron Drift/Legends|Cron Drift]] in the [[Auril sector/Legends|Auril sector]]. The planet was protected by the [[Crimson Aces]] until politicians on the planet feared the [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] might turn on them. The politicians sought aid from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] in razing the Aces' planet-side base.

{{Planet-stub}}
